lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there!

lines.speaker: Ali the Tailor
lines.text: I'm a little busy at the moment. What is it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can you tell me about Al Kharid?

lines.speaker: Ali the Tailor
lines.text: Oh, it has wonderful weather.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wonderful? It's hot and dry all the time!

lines.speaker: Ali the Tailor
lines.text: Not quite as hot as back home.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where's home, then?

lines.speaker: Ali the Tailor
lines.text: Oh, it's a town to the south of the pass, called Pollnivneach.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, what do you do here?

lines.speaker: Ali the Tailor
lines.text: If I had cloth, patterns and customers, I'd be a tailor. As it is, I'm a tailor with nothing to do.

lines.speaker: Ali the Tailor
lines.text: The silk merchant won't even sell me any silks, because he doesn't trust me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Anything I can do to help?

lines.speaker: Ali the Tailor
lines.text: No, no, it's all being dealt with.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I hear you work for Ali Morrisane...

lines.speaker: Ali the Tailor
lines.text: Of course, he's the one who's going to obtain cloth and clothes patterns so I can set up shop here.

lines.speaker: Ali the Tailor
lines.text: And in such a good location, too. Not out of the way like back home.

lines.speaker: Ali the Tailor
lines.text: The customers will soon pour in!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe I should talk to him...

lines.speaker: Ali the Tailor
lines.text: Why not? He's always happy to talk to potential business partners.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I hear you've been threatening the other shopkeepers.

lines.speaker: Ali the Tailor
lines.text: Me, threaten people?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: One of the shopkeepers did say they were threatened by a man with large scissors...

lines.speaker: Ali the Tailor
lines.text: Oh, them. Don't mind them. I think they're worried about what effect our shops will have.

lines.speaker: Ali the Tailor
lines.text: For all they know, when we open our shops their wares will look cheap and shabby by comparison!
